blended.narrative: Aspen Snowmass is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,282 ft. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
